TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Taznin go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 320.55 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 192.37 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 87.57 km²), 2,544 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,020 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 2,374 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Taznin go ays psgayun 6 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Larepaq , Tjuaqau , Seljupetje , Aljungic , Sinka , Mulinaga , Tjuabal , Dralendren , Tjuavanaq , Tjuamanges .
S.PHON: taznin ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu taznin ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, larepaq , tjuaqau , s~ɕeljupetje , aljuŋiʦ~ʨ , s~ɕinka , mulinaɣa , tjuaβal , *ralen*ren , tjua*anaq , tjuamaŋes~ɕ .
S.FORM: Taznin go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 320.55 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 192.37 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 87.57 km²), 2,544 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,020 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 2,374 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Taznin go ays psgayun 6 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Larepaq , Tjuaqau , Seljupetje , Aljungic , Sinka , Mulinaga , Tjuabal , Dralendren , Tjuavanaq , Tjuamanges .
S.PHON: taznin ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu taznin ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, larepaq , tjuaqau , s~ɕeljupetje , aljuŋiʦ~ʨ , s~ɕinka , mulinaɣa , tjuaβal , *ralen*ren , tjua*anaq , tjuamaŋes~ɕ .
